name: Sanar, Innovative First-Year
macro_plan: This R/U deck functions as a treasure-fueled midrange-combo hybrid that leverages artifact synergy and spell acceleration to out-value opponents. It aims to win by generating incremental advantage through cantrips and treasure generation, then closing games with high-impact threats or direct damage engines that overwhelm control and combo strategies while out-grinding aggro with efficient interaction.
tells: Common mistake: Overcommitting treasure on small threats instead of saving for finishers.
Unique interaction: Treasure can be used to cast spells with additional costs, so time your activations to bypass counters or trigger enter-the-battlefield effects.
keep a backup plan if your synergy is targeted.
Always track opponent's mana and interaction to avoid walking into hard counters or sweepers.

predicted_lines.line: Turn 1: Play a land and cast a cantrip or cheap artifact to establish mana/artifact synergy and draw into your game plan.
Turn 2: Deploy Sanar or cast Treasure Hunt to generate treasure, then follow up with a threat or interaction.
Prioritize untapped lands for R/U duals
